textByHash.46f76d31a63460f0e177878cb77c37456a917873: Salutations traveller! It is unusual for one of the creatures called 'humans' to visit this plane. How can I assist you?
textByHash.3e4311e8acfb947a217d1ef18c903a55b19c10a7: Then you've come to the right place. Star Flower, which is much prized for its magical properties, only grows on this plane. It has a very short life-span; plants grow, flower and die in the space of minutes! If you search
textByHash.ad2e9ecd14a8b4f5ec727768c5460808cc596e98: around you might find some growing somewhere.
textByHash.f2f8687b397ae80cfb8e3d59246d85457a685a16: I hope the beauty of my world brings you great joy.
textByHash.f350fbc9855fe7c516f61013cb45c0b1610b0238: My name, in your language, would be Bubrezankaldargarez'jk, but you can just call me Bub. This small plane is my home, here I study and ponder the mysteries of existence.
textByHash.e28dd03de29d4ffae7adbe2b89f547505a5fe0d7: Where do flies go at night?
textByHash.1d68ce3527344f752bdd104e34e236e4f906424c: Have you ever flicked through a dictionary and afterwards felt really depressed by how much you don't know?
textByHash.1b688f8bf40a64500cb8d721636f5c4bdefb60fa: Do other birds speak pigeon pidgin?
textByHash.0934772ce38f30e078f6912835cad807e77612af: Do sick days include when you're sick of work?
textByHash.5a6d98d2b57dbfd1fe12e89b769ac0ea75371dec: To be is to be the value of a variable.
textByHash.f1582b6917097284c8044ba3f78af833207e43b8: How do you know when you've run out of invisible ink?
textByHash.83767c8e164c04d690f27039ea56932c7d4ae908: Where does a snake's tail begin?
textByHash.ec6cb2f678948cec3a75c28fac35e112d0c6138b: How long do fish wait to swim after they eat?
textByHash.bec4938a39d9cff615979296065e9aeb91cb2592: If you're halfway from here to there, which is which?
